email_subject: Application for Digital Sales & IT Support Medewerker at Asap.be
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Digital Sales & IT Support Medewerker position at Asap.be. With a background in digital marketing, web development, and IT support, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage online orders, client communication, and website maintenance—skills directly relevant to this role. I have experience with order processing, customer service, and IT troubleshooting, including hardware and software issues. My technical foundation in WordPress, SEO, and analytics allows me to support both sales and IT functions effectively.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am detail-oriented, customer-focused, and eager to grow in a dynamic environment like Asap.be.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Digital Sales & IT Support Medewerker position at Asap.be. With a unique blend of digital sales experience and IT support skills, I am well-prepared to handle the diverse responsibilities of this role.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage online orders, process customer inquiries, and maintain client websites. This has given me hands-on experience with order processing, customer service, and troubleshooting technical issues—core aspects of this position. I am comfortable switching between administrative tasks, client communication, and IT support, ensuring a smooth workflow.

My technical background includes building and maintaining WordPress sites, performing SEO audits, and using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. I have also provided front-end development support at ViviDoctor, where I resolved technical issues and collaborated with teams. This experience translates well to IT support, where I can assist with hardware, software, and network issues.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am detail-oriented, proactive, and thrive in team environments. I am eager to bring my skills to Asap.be and contribute to both customer satisfaction and internal IT efficiency.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to your team.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Experience processing online orders and managing customer inquiries in a digital sales role
Hands-on IT support skills: troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues
Proficient in WordPress, Elementor, and web maintenance for internal systems
Strong analytical skills using Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush for performance tracking
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Sales & IT Support | Customer Service | Web & IT
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and IT support. At Episto, I manage online orders, customer inquiries, and website maintenance, ensuring a smooth order flow and top client experience. I also troubleshoot technical issues and support IT-related tasks. On my own project (mirook.com), I've applied structured data and technical audits. Comfortable across sales support, customer service, and IT troubleshooting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Order processing & customer service: handling web orders, managing returns, client communication
- IT support: troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues; liaising with external IT partners
- Web & CMS: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva
- SEO & analytics: on-page SEO, keyword research, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Social media: content integration and coordination
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Process and follow up on web orders, ensuring accurate order flow and timely delivery
- Handle customer inquiries via email and phone, providing product information and resolving issues
- Manage returns and exchanges, maintaining customer satisfaction
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and Astra, including content updates and page improvements
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide decisions
- Provide internal IT support for hardware and software issues, coordinating with external partners when needed

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Troubleshot technical issues and collaborated with cross-functional teams

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
